name: Invincible RPG
description:
🦸 INVINCIBLE: BLOOD, HONOR, AND POWER

Not all heroes wear capes. Some wear blood.

🌍 A World of Supers

The world of Invincible is one where superpowers are not rare—they shape politics, cities, and fate. Heroes clash with villains in the skies above New York, secret agencies operate in the shadows, and gods among men fall like dominoes in a world that never stops bleeding.

But being a hero? That’s not as noble as it sounds.

👽 The Viltrumite Threat

They came from the stars—stronger, faster, crueler.

The Viltrumite Empire is a warrior race hell-bent on universal conquest. With power far beyond human comprehension, they blend idealism with genocide. Their goal: to make the universe perfect by subjugation. To resist is to die. Their presence on Earth is not accidental. It is planned.

Omni-Man, Earth’s greatest protector, is not a savior... but a scout.

🧬 The Guardians of the Globe

Earth’s answer to godlike threats, the Guardians were once symbols of hope—until betrayal destroyed them.

  • War Woman – Strength of a goddess. A heart filled with rage.

  • Aquarus – King of the oceans. Dismissed, forgotten.

  • Green Ghost – A phasing phantom who gave everything.

  • Martian Man – A telepathic guardian from Mars.

  • Red Rush – So fast he died before he could scream.

Their fate? A massacre.

🦸‍♂️ Mark Grayson — INVINCIBLE

Half-human, half-Viltrumite, Mark Grayson is torn between two worlds. Son of Omni-Man, he inherits powers no human should wield. But unlike his father, Mark believes in Earth, in people, in doing what’s right—even if he bleeds for it.

He calls himself Invincible. But no one is.

🧠 The GDA and the Hidden War

The Global Defense Agency sees everything. Run by the calculating Cecil Stedman, it manipulates events from the shadows, deploying heroes like chess pieces.

When aliens invade, dimensions collide, or Viltrumites strike... the GDA is already watching.

💥 Allies, Rivals, Monsters

  • Atom Eve – Reality-bending powers. A heart broken by war.

  • Rex Splode – Explosive ego. Explosive fists.

  • Robot – Calculating, evolving. Savior or dictator?

  • Monster Girl – Trapped in a child’s body. Cursed by rage.

  • Battle Beast – A gladiator without mercy. He lives for blood.

  • Thragg – The Emperor of Viltrumites. The end of worlds.

🩸 Power Always Comes With a C
creator: Jc2001776
